name: Munnar
description: A breathtaking hill station in Kerala nestled among tea plantations.
details: Munnar is renowned for its vast expanses of tea plantations, misty mountains, and exotic wildlife. Key attractions include Eravikulam National Park, Mattupetty Dam, and Top Station.

name: Jaipur
description: The Pink City of India, famous for its palaces and forts.
details: Jaipur, the capital of Rajasthan, is known for its stunning architecture including the Hawa Mahal, Amber Fort, and City Palace. The bustling bazaars offer beautiful handicrafts.

name: Goa
description: India's sun-kissed coastal paradise with golden beaches and vibrant nightlife.
details: Goa offers a unique blend of Indian and Portuguese culture. Famous for Calangute Beach, Old Goa Churches, spice plantations, and the vibrant nightlife at Baga Beach.

name: Leh Ladakh
description: A high-altitude desert with stunning landscapes and ancient monasteries.
details: Leh Ladakh is a land of dramatic landscapes, crystal-clear lakes, and ancient Buddhist monasteries. Pangong Lake, Nubra Valley, and Khardung La pass are must-visits.

name: Varanasi
description: One of the oldest living cities in the world, on the banks of the Ganges.
details: Varanasi is a spiritual capital of India, famous for its ghats, the Ganga Aarti ceremony, and ancient temples like Kashi Vishwanath. The city comes alive at dawn.

name: Andaman Islands
description: Pristine islands with turquoise waters and rich marine biodiversity.
details: The Andaman Islands are a paradise for beach lovers and adventure seekers. Radhanagar Beach, Cellular Jail, and Elephant Beach offer unforgettable experiences.
